beginner.question: How read it?
beginner.answer: Use a voltage divider into an Analog-to-Digital Converter (ADC).

intermediate.question: Why calibrate?
intermediate.answer: Response is nonlinear and varies per unit.

advanced.question: Failure mode?
advanced.answer: Cracking the ink path causes open circuit.

expert.question: Improve life?
expert.answer: Avoid sharp creases; use within rated bend.
